name: vendor-eval-3task
description: Research two vendors in parallel and synthesize a recommendation memo

tasks.prompt: Research vendor A using the available sources. Write vendor-a.json with keys: vendor, pricing, security, integrations, support, risks, recommendation_score, sources.
tasks.name: Vendor A Researcher
tasks.goal: Produce a structured vendor brief for option A
tasks.scope: Vendor A evaluation across commercial, technical, and risk dimensions

tasks.prompt: Research vendor B using the available sources. Write vendor-b.json with keys: vendor, pricing, security, integrations, support, risks, recommendation_score, sources.
tasks.name: Vendor B Researcher
tasks.goal: Produce a structured vendor brief for option B
tasks.scope: Vendor B evaluation across commercial, technical, and risk dimensions

tasks.prompt: Read vendor-a.json and vendor-b.json. Produce vendor-comparison.md with a side-by-side matrix, a recommendation, key tradeoffs, and open questions.
tasks.name: Recommendation Writer
tasks.goal: Recommend the stronger vendor and explain the tradeoffs
tasks.scope: Synthesize the two vendor briefs into a decision memo
